name_zh: 证据链 / 工作量证明
中心辐射式 SDLC 状态机

name_en: M x N Cross-Model Consensus Grid

name_zh: 稀疏 Git Worktree 评审
评审前多阶段仓库勘探
对抗三方 + 反驳环节
测试脚手架 + 约定强制
智能跳过分诊 + 模型追踪
破坏性操作前抢救标记
带石蕊测试的严重度量规
策略即数据（声明式 YAML）
状态文件为唯一连续性
自主解决 PR 反馈
错峰突发查询 + 限速
自然语言到关系模式分解
图表决策树 + 反模式护栏
知识库索引 + 意图路由
启发式评分 + 信号检测

name_en: Data Shape to Query Pattern Detection
name_zh: 数据形状到查询模式检测
可写性规则 + 替换表
中心辐射路由 + 重叠消解
带类型门的 DAG 旅程
多源证据收割 + 目标综合
承诺检测与知识库同步
风险排序批量迁移 + 构建校验
因 PII 的投递限制
Composio 三步 SaaS 集成
带填充示例的输出格式
按输入类型的多工作流路由
字体/资源打包 + 目录引用
带视觉验证的 QA 子 Agent
评测驱动的技能改进循环
非 Anthropic 供应商防护
分叉 vs 全新生成
不可变记忆 + 梦境整合
预置目录 + 即时生成回退
以 Agent 为中心的工具设计原则
技能创作的压力场景 TDD

name_en: DOT-Graph Decision Flow Embedded in Prompt
name_zh: 提示词内嵌 DOT 图决策流
市场源类型多态（SHA 锁定）
自循环 Stop Hook（Ralph 循环）

problem_en: A controller dispatching a reviewer subagent can quietly bias it—pre-rating severity or saying what not to flag—defeating independent review.
problem_zh: 派发评审子 agent 的控制器会偷偷给它下暗示（预判严重度、指定不要报什么），从而架空独立评审。

name_zh: 理由即主张（自证不降级）
problem_en: Implementers embed self-justifications ('left it per YAGNI'); a reviewer that accepts them lets the author grade their own work.
problem_zh: 实现者在报告里塞自我辩护（如「按 YAGNI 留着」）；评审若采信，等于让作者给自己打分。

name_en: Plan-Mandated Defect Is Still a Finding
name_zh: 计划强制的缺陷仍是问题
problem_en: When a plan explicitly mandates something the rubric calls a defect, agents skip the finding as 'the plan chose this'.
problem_zh: 当计划明确要求了评审标准视为缺陷的东西，agent 会以「计划选的」为由跳过不报。

name_en: Diff-Scoped Review with Named-Risk Escape Hatch
name_zh: 限定 diff 范围 + 具名风险例外
problem_en: Reviewers waste context re-reading whole files, yet some cross-cutting risks genuinely need looking beyond the diff.
problem_zh: 评审重读整文件浪费上下文，但个别横切风险确实需要越过 diff 看——需要收紧默认加可审计的例外。

name_en: Reviewer Does Not Re-Run the Implementer's Tests
name_zh: 评审不重跑实现者的测试
problem_en: Reviewers re-running the full suite duplicate the implementer's TDD evidence and burn context; run a focused test only on specific doubt.
problem_zh: 评审重跑全套测试是在重复实现者已给的 TDD 证据、烧上下文；只在有具体疑点时跑一个聚焦测试。

problem_en: Dispatches that omit the model field silently inherit the session's most expensive model, defeating cost-optimized routing.
problem_zh: 派发时不写 model 字段会静默继承会话里最贵的模型，架空成本优化路由。

name_zh: 以文件为 agent 间总线
problem_en: Everything pasted into a dispatch and everything a subagent prints stays in the orchestrator's context, re-read every turn.
problem_zh: 派发里粘贴的、子 agent 打印回来的，都常驻编排者上下文、每轮重读——应改走唯一命名文件。

problem_en: Controllers pad each dispatch with prior-task summaries ('state after Tasks 1-3')—one real dispatch hit 42k chars, 99% history.
problem_zh: 控制器往每次派发里塞累积历史（如「任务 1-3 后的状态」）；真实一次派发达 42k 字符、99% 是历史。

name_en: Batch Remediation: One Fixer for All Findings
name_zh: 批量修复：一个修复者处理全部问题
problem_en: Dispatching a fix subagent per finding makes each rebuild context and re-run suites; the fix wave can cost more than all tasks combined.
problem_zh: 每个问题派一个修复 agent，各自重建上下文、重跑测试；这波修复能比所有任务加起来还贵。

problem_en: No crisp criterion for task boundaries: split too fine drowns reviewers, too coarse bundles separately-approvable changes.
problem_zh: 任务边界缺明确判据：切太细淹没评审，切太粗把该分开批的改动捆一起。

problem_en: Project-wide requirements get scattered/paraphrased/dropped across tasks; hoist them once, verbatim, as a block all tasks inherit and reviewers use as a lens.
problem_zh: 全局要求在各任务间被打散、转述、丢失；一次性逐字抽成一个块，所有任务继承、评审当注意力透镜。

problem_en: Isolated subagents drift on signatures (Task 3 defines clearLayers, Task 7 calls clearFullLayers) with no view of neighbors.
problem_zh: 隔离执行的子 agent 看不到邻居，签名漂移（任务 3 定义 clearLayers，任务 7 却调 clearFullLayers）。

name_en: Match the Form to the Failure
name_zh: 让指导形式匹配失败类型
problem_en: Authors reach for prohibition lists for every problem, but the form that fixes a discipline violation backfires on wrong-shaped or omitted output.
problem_zh: 作者遇事就写禁令表，但修「违纪」的形式用在「输出形状错或漏元素」上反而更糟——四类失败对应四种形式。

name_zh: 带无指导对照的措辞微测试
problem_en: Full pressure runs are slow per iteration; cheap wording-level A/B with a no-guidance control stop-condition and cross-rep variance as the binding signal.
problem_zh: 整场压力测试每轮太慢；用便宜的措辞级 A/B 加无指导对照当停止条件，跨次方差作为是否生效的信号。

problem_en: Offering an optional token-heavy capability upfront wastes turns on a feature that may never be needed; defer to first genuine benefit.
problem_zh: 提前提议一个可选的重 token 能力，浪费在可能永不需要的功能上；推迟到第一次真正有用时再提。

problem_en: A skill body hardcoding one harness's tool names breaks on every other; author in capability verbs, bind names in a per-harness adapter.
problem_zh: skill 正文硬编码某一宿主的工具名，换宿主就崩；用能力动词写正文，把名字绑定放进各宿主适配器。

name_zh: 按宿主条件加载参考文件
problem_en: An always-loaded bootstrap pays token tax every turn; carry only the universal rule + a dispatch table, self-identify harness and load one adapter file.
problem_zh: 常驻 bootstrap 每轮都交 token 税；只带通用规则加分发表，运行时自识别宿主、只加载一个适配文件。

name_zh: 能力缺失时的反捏造回退
problem_en: On a harness lacking a capability, the agent hallucinates the missing tool call; forbid fabrication, route to a named documented degradation.
problem_zh: 在缺少某能力的宿主上，agent 会幻觉出那个工具调用；禁止捏造，改走具名的、有文档的降级路径。

problem_en: Migration reports drown in generic breaking changes that never apply here; scope to the intersection of general knowledge and what this tree actually calls.
problem_zh: 迁移报告淹没在此处根本用不到的通用破坏性变更里；限定为通用知识与本代码真正调用的交集。

problem_en: Agents claim coverage from a tool merely installed but never run; track present / runnable-here / actually-ran and never fold findings unless it ran.
problem_zh: agent 拿仅安装、从未成功运行的工具充数；区分 存在／此处可运行／确实运行 三态，没真跑就不并入结论。

problem_en: Proving a version uplift changed nothing is hard; run the same suite on both runtimes, diff per-test—goal is 'no behavior changed', not 'all green'.
problem_zh: 证明版本升级什么都没变很难；同一套测试在新旧运行时各跑一遍、逐测对比——目标是行为不变而非全绿。

name_zh: 能力冒烟测试优于存在检查
problem_en: 'command -v tool' proves a binary exists, not that it can process this codebase; exercise it on one real input (syntax-only compile).
problem_zh: command -v tool 只证明二进制存在，不证明它能处理本代码；拿一个真实文件跑一次（仅语法编译）来验证。

problem_en: A downstream artifact silently goes stale when an upstream one it derives from is regenerated; compare mtimes along the derivation DAG.
problem_zh: 上游产物被重新生成时，下游派生产物会静默过期；沿派生 DAG 比对修改时间，标出比其输入更旧的产物。

problem_en: A living status page must report only what changed since last time, across machines; embed a machine-readable state block the next run diffs against.
problem_zh: 活文档需跨机器只报上次以来的变化；在产物里内嵌机读状态块，下次运行读上一版渲染再做差分。

problem_en: Drawing a dependency diagram is heavy and drifts; encode order in a two-part item number (X blocked-on-prior-stage, Y parallel-within-stage).
problem_zh: 画依赖图又重又易漂；把顺序编进两段式编号（X 表示卡在上一阶段，Y 表示同阶段可并行）。

problem_en: A credential read is malicious only when routed to a different service than it belongs to; judge ownership by name/storage, not claimed use.
problem_zh: 读凭据只有在被送往其所属之外的服务时才恶意；按名字或存储位置判归属，而非按插件声称的用途。

name_zh: 全载荷审查范围（发布不等于加载）
problem_en: Review anchored to the loaded surface misses code that ships to disk but isn't auto-loaded (a git install clones the whole repo, incl. .claude/).
problem_zh: 只盯被加载的部分会漏掉发布到磁盘但不自动加载的代码（git 安装会克隆整仓，含 .claude/）。

name_zh: 不可信内容当作标记转义
problem_en: Fetched text embedded into generated HTML is untrusted markup too; a PR title with </script> can break out—entity-encode wherever it lands.
problem_zh: 抓取文本嵌入生成的 HTML 时也是不可信标记；含 </script> 的 PR 标题能越狱——落到哪里就在哪里实体转义。

name_zh: 派生产物的传递性污染
problem_en: An intermediate artifact generated from untrusted input inherits its taint; follow its structure but never execute imperatives embedded in it.
problem_zh: 由不可信输入生成的中间产物继承其污染；跟随其结构，但绝不执行其中嵌入的祈使指令。

name_zh: 生成产物不落真实密钥
problem_en: A credential literal in source can leak into a committed fixture/config default; use same-shape fakes + env placeholders, read real secrets from env only.
problem_zh: 源码里的凭据字面量会漏进被提交的测试夹具或配置默认值；用同形假值加环境变量占位，真密钥只从环境读。

name_zh: 呈现前的回路内自我纠正
problem_en: Post-hoc review after the user sees output forces a round-trip; a stop-hook fast reviewer feeds high-severity findings back for in-turn repair.
problem_zh: 用户看到输出后再评审要多跑一趟；stop-hook 触发的快评审把高危问题回喂，让 agent 在本轮内先修好。

problem_en: An automated reviewer re-flags the same known-safe line every run; let a human waive it via a co-located inline comment the reviewer honors.
problem_zh: 自动评审每次都重报同一条已知安全的行；允许人在该行旁写内联注释解释，评审读到即视为豁免。

name_en: Immutable-Slug Identity with Rename Redirect Map
name_zh: 不可变 slug 身份 + 改名重定向表
problem_en: A registry entry's name is an immutable slug—renaming breaks installs; edit displayName for labels, add a renames map for unavoidable renames.
problem_zh: 注册项的 name 是不可变 slug，改名会毁掉已有安装；改标签用 displayName，非改不可时加 renames 映射表自动迁移。

problem_en: Anchor a whole region of agent behavior in the fewest tokens by reusing a compact pretrained concept (lesson, fog of war, tracer bullets) as a behavioral hook.
problem_zh: 用最少 token 锚定一整片行为：复用模型预训练里已有的紧凑概念词（lesson、fog of war、tracer bullets）当行为钩子。

name_zh: 调用经济学（上下文载荷 vs 认知载荷）
problem_en: Decide model-invoked vs user-invoked by trade-off: a description sits in context every turn (context load); user-invoked spends the human's memory (cognitive load).
problem_zh: 按取舍决定模型触发还是用户触发：描述每轮占上下文（上下文载荷）；用户触发则消耗人的记忆（认知载荷）。

problem_en: Visible downstream steps tug attention toward 'being done', so the agent rushes the current step; hide them across a real context boundary.
problem_zh: 可见的后续步骤把注意力拉向快完成了，agent 就赶当前步；把它们藏到真正的上下文边界之外。

name_zh: 空操作测试（相对默认剪枝）
problem_en: Skills accumulate lines the model already obeys by default; hunt no-ops sentence by sentence—settle by running the skill, not by debate.
problem_zh: skill 会堆积模型本就默认遵守的句子；逐句猎杀空操作——用跑 skill 判定，不靠嘴仗。

name_zh: 双轴完成判据（可判定 + 穷尽）
problem_en: Vague 'done' lets the agent declare victory early or do shallow work; make it checkable (guards rushing) and exhaustive (guards thoroughness).
problem_zh: 模糊的完成让 agent 早早收工或干浅活；把判据做成可判定（防赶工）加穷尽（防敷衍）。

name_zh: 受控词表 + 禁用近义词
problem_en: Term drift (component/service/API/boundary) dissolves the shared language a skill depends on; pin exact terms with a per-term 'Avoid' ban list.
problem_zh: 术语漂移（component/service/API/boundary）会溶解 skill 依赖的共同语言；钉死用词，每个术语附避免禁用表。

problem_en: The agent adopts a plausible-but-wrong mental model of a concept, corrupting everything downstream; pre-empt and refute competing definitions.
problem_zh: agent 会采用某概念似是而非的心智模型，污染下游一切；预先列出并驳斥竞争性定义。

problem_en: Long-form generation loses the reader when a passage leans on a concept not yet established; keep a running 'grounded' set and only pick reachable beats.
problem_zh: 长文生成中某段落依赖尚未铺垫的概念会丢读者；维护一个已落地集合，只挑依赖已满足的节拍。

problem_en: Planning a large effort where downstream decisions can't yet be phrased; keep a deliberately incomplete map, graduate fog to tickets once statable.
problem_zh: 规划超大工作时下游决策还没法表述；地图故意留白，问题一旦能精确提出就从迷雾转为工单。

name_zh: 双轴正交评审（不跨轴重排）
problem_en: One review dimension masks a failure in another (clean code that builds the wrong thing); run axes separately and never rerank across them.
problem_zh: 一个评审维度会掩盖另一维度的失败（代码干净但做错了东西）；两轴分开跑，绝不跨轴合并重排。

name_en: Push-Right Checkpoint (Ask Once, Late, as a Brief)
name_zh: 右推检查点（一次、靠后、给 brief）
problem_en: Involving the human too early or dumping raw output wastes their attention; defer the checkpoint, ask once with a decision-ready brief, never a draft.
problem_zh: 过早找人或甩原始输出都浪费其注意力；把检查点尽量后推，一次性给决策就绪的 brief 而非草稿。

name_zh: 探索/利用分为两个 skill
problem_en: Agents converge on structure too early, collapsing the space of what could be produced; make divergence and convergence different invocations.
problem_zh: agent 过早收敛到结构，压垮了可能产出的空间；把发散与收敛做成不同的调用，结构上无法边探索边利用。

problem_en: When you can't write a clean regression test, the temptation is a bad one (false confidence); report the gap as a first-class architectural finding.
problem_zh: 写不出干净回归测试时容易写个坏的（假信心）；应把没有正确接缝当作一等架构发现上报并移交。

name_zh: 反馈回路先于假设的门
problem_en: Agents jump to theories before they can even detect the bug; require one already-run red-capable command before any hypothesis phase.
problem_zh: agent 在还没法检测到 bug 时就跳去猜；进入假设阶段前，先要有一条已跑过、能变红的命令。

name_en: HITL Typing — Agent Never Simulates the Human
name_zh: HITL 打字——agent 绝不代人作答
problem_en: In a human-in-the-loop step, an agent will fabricate the human's answers to keep moving; a HITL ticket only resolves through the live exchange.
problem_zh: 在人机协同步骤里，agent 会捏造人的回答以推进；HITL 工单只能靠真实往返解决，不许自问自答。

name_en: Static-Trace Verification When Execution Is Unsafe
name_zh: 执行不安全时的静态追踪验证
problem_en: Some artifacts can't be safely run (open browsers, block on input, irreversible) yet need verification; trace values statically instead of executing.
problem_zh: 有些产物没法安全运行（开浏览器、阻塞等输入、不可逆）却仍需验证；改用静态追踪值流而非真的执行。

name_en: Smart Zone — Fork Before Reasoning Degrades
name_zh: 智能区——推理退化前先分叉
problem_en: Reasoning quality falls off well before the hard context limit; fork/handoff at the reasoning-quality cliff, not at the token cap.
problem_zh: 推理质量在硬上下文上限之前就明显下滑；在推理质量悬崖处就分叉或交接，而不是等到 token 塞满。

problem_en: Decision logs bloat with trivia; record a decision only when all three hold—hard to reverse, surprising without context, and a real trade-off.
problem_zh: 决策日志被琐事撑爆；只有三条同时成立才记：难以逆转、无背景会让人意外、且是真正的取舍。
